style_base: Modern xianxia character illustration rooted in Chinese traditional aesthetics, ethereal fantasy atmosphere with soft rim light and subtle qi aura, crisp intricate linework with richly detailed silk garments, elaborate fabric folds and embroidered trim, ornate traditional accessories (jade pendants, silk sashes, hairpieces), individually rendered flowing hair strands, Tang-Song dynasty hanfu and wuxia silhouettes with Chinese ink painting influence on drapery and ribbon flow, richly layered digital illustration with soft painterly shading and clean highlights (not flat cel-shading, not anime cel-shading), bright clear luminous atmosphere with neutral to slightly cool color temperature, saturated clean colors on pure white background, realistic adult human proportions with mature facial structure, elegant full-body figure, restrained composition with generous negative space, transparent background, no background scenery, clean blank backdrop, clean and focused single-character composition
no_text_constraint: CRITICAL REQUIREMENT: The image must be completely free of any text, letters, words, characters, writing systems, calligraphy, seals, stamps, chop marks, red seal marks, watermarks, signatures, inscriptions, or labels of any kind anywhere in the image. The image should contain ONLY the visual subject with no decorative text elements.
style_negative: no chibi, no Q-version, no oversized head, no anime face, no manga face, no big sparkly anime eyes, no small anime nose, no anime cheek blush, no anime aesthetic, no Japanese anime style, no Japanese manga style, no cel-shaded flat style, no flat cel-shading, no anime cel-shading, no shoujo style, no isekai art style, no Genshin Impact style, no Honkai style, no photorealism, no western fantasy style, no 3D render, no oil painting, no complex background, no multiple characters, no extra arms, no extra fingers, no cropped feet, no distorted anatomy, no yellow tint, no sepia tone, no aged paper, no ivory background, no cream background, no paper texture, no rice paper look, no warm color cast, no classical Chinese painting yellowing, no gongbi-on-silk look, no antique look, no dim lighting, no gloomy mood, no muddy colors, no heavy shading, no flat boring shading, no modern casual wear, no simplified minimal design, no sparse empty costume, no plain undetailed fabric, no lazy rendering, no featureless accessories
item_template:
East Asian ink wash painting style, simple bold brush strokes, light watercolor wash.
{no_text}
Single item centered on a transparent background: {description}.
Slightly angled for depth. A few wisps of light ink smoke curl around the item.
Simple minimal style — a few strokes define the shape, not dense detail.
Transparent background, no other objects, no decorative elements around the item.
The image must contain absolutely zero text, zero stamps, zero seals, zero red marks.
Vertical composition, item fills most of the frame.

DO NOT include: {negative}
